title: World Class Art in Middle of Kalahari
text:
The Art here is world class.  Worth a drive from Maun just to see it. The studio houses hundreds of paintings and lithographs. Also you can usually see women making traditional beads from ostrich shells.

Also visit the Kuru Museum and Cultural Center, a small community run gem that explains the history of the San.  If it isn't open, just ask around town and they usually come over to open it.

AND a young women recently opened D'Kar first restaurant across from the kgotla. Very typical food and great to support the town people

placeInfo.name: Kuru Art Project
placeInfo.address: the art center is located in Dekar. Just make a right coming from Maun or a left coming from Ghanzi and turn into Dekar. At the end of the t junction turn right, Ghanzi Botswana

addressObj.street2: the art center is located in Dekar. Just make a right coming from Maun or a left coming from Ghanzi and turn into Dekar. At the end of the t junction turn right

title: A Must-Visit for Superb Art
text: Paintings, printmaking, and textile art created by locals, and the money supports a whole village. What better reason to visit is there? The whole place has a joyous, creative vibe that is infectious.
